releaseNotes:
• Fix: after swapping the mini-player with the full-screen player, the demoted channel no longer reconnects in the background. Previously each swap left a phantom full-screen engine alive that could spontaneously steal audio or change the visible feed. The outgoing player is now fully stopped before the new one takes over.
• Fix: pressing back after multiple swaps now reliably disposes a single engine instead of 3+ phantom instances, eliminating the force-close that was required in some cases.
